questions.question: What is assurance in security evaluation?
questions.explanation: Assurance indicates the degree of trust that security requirements are met.

questions.explanation: Higher levels generally provide greater confidence.

questions.explanation: Higher levels require more rigorous evaluation.

questions.explanation: Levels indicate the depth of evaluation.

questions.explanation: Stronger evaluation methods provide higher assurance.

questions.explanation: Assurance indicates confidence in security controls.

options: Higher assurance generally reduces uncertainty about risk
